hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); COMMAND=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE "git commit "; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PreToolUse\", \"permissionDecision\": \"deny\", \"permissionDecisionReason\": \"Direct git commits are blocked. Use /gitcommit or @gitcommit-agent instead.\"}}"; else echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PreToolUse\", \"permissionDecision\": \"allow\"}}"; fi'
